title: gaultheria merrillii
intro: Gaultheria merrillii, also known as the mountain tea or Merrill's Gaultheria, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gaultheria merrillii include relief from fever, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve digestion. Gaultheria merrillii is often prepared as a herbal tea, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy and as a topical treatment for skin irritations.
